## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this useful for `django-static-starter-ar`, the Arabic RTL version of the starter template?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Small improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Reusable starter-template example

## Checklist

- [ ] This change fits a reusable starter template, not a product-specific app.
- [ ] I did not add new dependencies, `package.json`, an `npm` workflow, or a frontend build step unless explicitly justified.
- [ ] Frontend auth state remains memory-only.
- [ ] The documented Django session/cookie auth contract is preserved, or this change explicitly updates the related docs and tests.
- [ ] I tested the change manually, or noted why I could not test it.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out anything reviewers should check closely, or write "None".
